data.name: Main Agent
data.description: General-purpose SambaNova agent that coordinates specialized coding, financial analysis, deep research, and data science subagents. Uses the non-interactive endpoint by default and switches to the interactive endpoint when resume or thread metadata is supplied.

data.name: Coding Agent
data.description: SambaNova coding agent for sandboxed Python execution, debugging, and iterative code development. Provide agent-specific code in SambaNova provider metadata.

data.name: Data Science Agent
data.description: SambaNova data science agent for dataset analysis, visualizations, and comprehensive HTML reports. Accepts uploaded file content parts and supports interactive resume metadata.

data.name: Deep Research Agent
data.description: SambaNova deep research agent for multi-iteration research workflows and comprehensive reports, including interactive approval/resume flows through thread metadata.

data.name: Financial Analysis Agent
data.description: SambaNova financial analysis agent for stock analysis, company research, financial metrics, and market data workflows.
